# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a single-page application (SPA) built with React 18 and TypeScript, using Vite as the build tool. It follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Core Technologies
- **Frontend Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build System**: Vite with SWC compiler
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
- **UI Library**: shadcn/ui (built on Radix UI primitives)
- **Routing**: React Router DOM v6
- **State Management**: React Query for server state, local component state
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL database + Auth + Edge Functions)
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod schema validation
- **Rich Text**: Tiptap editor
- **Charts**: Recharts
- **Testing**: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E

## Application Structure

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap, renders App component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main application component with routing and providers

### Key Directories
- `src/components/`: Reusable UI components
  - `ui/`: shadcn/ui component library
  - `layout/`: AppLayout, AppSidebar, TopBar
  - Feature-specific components (evaluations/, hr-policies/, settings/)
- `src/pages/`: Route components (Dashboard, Employees, etc.)
- `src/hooks/`: Custom hooks (useAuth, useToast)
- `src/lib/`: Utilities (utils.ts, role-access.ts)
- `src/integrations/`: External service integrations (Supabase client/types)

## Routing Structure

The application uses React Router with protected routes and role-based access control:

### Public Routes
- `/`: Redirects to /dashboard (authenticated) or /login
- `/login`: Authentication page
- `/forgot-password`: Password recovery

### Protected Routes (require authentication)
- `/dashboard`: Main dashboard
- `/employees`: Employee list
- `/employees/new`: New employee form
- `/employees/:id`: Employee profile
- `/employees/:id/edit`: Edit employee
- `/projects`: Project list
- `/projects/new`, `/projects/:id`, `/projects/:id/edit`: Project management
- `/clients`, `/clients/:id`: Client management
- `/invoices`, `/invoices/new`, `/invoices/:id`, `/invoices/:id/edit`: Invoice management
- `/hr-policies`, `/hr-policies/new`, `/hr-policies/:id`, `/hr-policies/:id/edit`: HR policy management
- `/evaluations`: Quarterly evaluations
- `/evaluations/new`, `/evaluations/:id`, `/evaluations/:id/edit`: Evaluation management
- `/evaluations/daily`, `/evaluations/daily/new`, `/evaluations/daily/:id`: Daily evaluations
- `/loans`: Loan management
- `/payroll`: Payroll processing
- `/my-payslip`: Employee payslip view
- `/settings`: Application settings
- `/holidays`: Public holidays management

## Authentication & Authorization

### Auth System
- Uses Supabase Auth for user authentication
- Supports email/password and invite-based registration
- Password reset and account recovery flows

### Role-Based Access Control
Implemented in `src/lib/role-access.ts` with the `canAccess` function:

- **CEO**: Full access to all routes
- **HR Manager**: Access to HR functions, evaluations, payroll, settings
- **Team Lead**: Limited access to team management and evaluations
- **Employee**: Basic access to personal data

Routes are protected by the `ProtectedRoute` component in App.tsx, which checks authentication and authorization.

## Key Components

### Layout Components
- **AppLayout**: Main layout wrapper with sidebar and content area
- **AppSidebar**: Navigation sidebar with role-based menu items
- **TopBar**: Top navigation bar with user menu and notifications

### Feature Components
- **EvaluationTimeline**: Displays chronological evaluation history with filtering by role
- **SearchableEmployeeSelect**: Combobox for employee selection with search and avatar display
- **RichTextEditor**: Tiptap-based WYSIWYG editor for policies and content
- **BeudoxLogo**: Brand logo with variant support (default/sidebar)

### UI Components
Extensive use of shadcn/ui components:
- Form controls (Input, Select, Button, etc.)
- Layout components (Card, Tabs, Dialog, etc.)
- Data display (Table, Badge, Avatar, etc.)
- Feedback (Toast, Alert, Skeleton, etc.)

## Data Management

### Supabase Integration
- Client configured in `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`
- Type definitions in `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`
- Database schema managed via migrations in `supabase/migrations/`
- Edge functions for complex operations (payroll generation, invoice PDF creation)

### React Query Usage
- Centralized data fetching and caching
- Query keys follow pattern: `['resource', id, companyId]`
- Mutations for create/update/delete operations
- Optimistic updates where appropriate

## Styling & Design

### Design System
- **Fonts**: Outfit (display), DM Sans (body), Courier New (mono)
- **Colors**: CSS custom properties with light/dark mode support
- **Spacing**: Tailwind's spacing scale
- **Border Radius**: Configurable via CSS variables

### Tailwind Configuration
- Custom color palette including brand colors (bx-violet, bx-indigo, etc.)
- Extended typography with @tailwindcss/typography
- Animation utilities for accordions and transitions

## Development Workflow

### Scripts
- `npm run dev`: Start development server on port 8080
- `npm run build`: Production build
- `npm run test`: Run unit tests with Vitest
- `npm run lint`: ESLint checking
- `npm run preview`: Preview production build

### Configuration Files
- `vite.config.ts`: Build configuration with React plugin and path aliases
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Styling configuration with custom theme
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript configuration
- `eslint.config.js`: Linting rules
- `playwright.config.ts`: E2E testing configuration

## Database Schema

The application uses Supabase with the following key tables:
- `employees`: Employee profiles and organizational data
- `companies`: Company information
- `projects`: Project management
- `clients`: Client relationships
- `invoices`: Invoice tracking
- `evaluations`: Quarterly performance reviews
- `daily_evaluations`: Daily feedback system
- `hr_policies`: Company policies
- `payroll`: Payroll records
- `loans`: Employee loans
- `departments`: Organizational structure
- `roles`: User roles and permissions

## Edge Functions

Supabase Edge Functions handle complex server-side operations:
- `generate-payroll`: Automated payroll calculation
- `generate-invoice-pdf`: PDF invoice generation
- `send-invoice-email`: Email notifications
- `invite-employee`: Employee invitation system
- `deactivate-employee`: Employee deactivation
- `delete-employee`: Employee removal

## Testing Strategy

- **Unit Tests**: Component and utility function testing with Vitest
- **Integration Tests**: API integration testing
- **E2E Tests**: User workflow testing with Playwright
- **Test Setup**: `src/test/setup.ts` for test configuration

## Performance Considerations

- Code splitting via React.lazy for route components
- Image optimization with proper sizing
- React Query for efficient data caching
- Tree shaking with Vite build process
- Optimized bundle with SWC compiler

## Security

- Row Level Security (RLS) policies in Supabase
- Authentication required for all data access
- Role-based data filtering in queries
- Input validation with Zod schemas
- XSS protection via React's built-in sanitization
